title: Definition
doc_html:
CHAPTER 2.  VENUE

SECTION 1.  GENERAL DISPOSITIONS

Art. 41.  Definition

Venue means the parish where an action or proceeding may properly be brought and tried under the rules regulating the subject.

CHAPTER 2.  VENUE
SECTION 1.  GENERAL DISPOSITIONS
Art. 41.  Definition
Venue means the parish where an action or proceeding may properly be brought and tried under the rules regulating the subject.
